summary: Testing completed for Feature Flags and E-commerce Store functionality. All 6 backend tests passed (100% success rate). Features tested: tenant login returns features & limits, /auth/me returns features & limits, store settings save slug to main_db, public store access without auth, add product to store, create order with COD.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature Flags implementation is working correctly - tenant login (unified-login) returns features and limits from the subscription plan
/auth/me endpoint correctly returns features and limits for authenticated tenant users
Store settings correctly saves store_slug to main_db.store_slugs collection
Public store endpoint /shop/{store_slug} works without authentication
Product can be added to store via /store/products endpoint
Public order creation with COD works via /shop/{store_slug}/order endpoint
seed_data_creation: Used existing test product ID: a66406e1-9476-406a-b146-69c1ca0e2b13 (هاتف سامسونج A54). Created store order WEB000002 during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Feature Flags and E-commerce Store features verified successfully: 1) unified-login returns features={pos:true,inventory:true,customers:true,reports:true,multi_warehouse:false,woocommerce:false} and limits={products:100,users:2,warehouses:1} for tenant users, 2) /auth/me endpoint returns same features and limits, 3) PUT /api/store/settings saves store_slug to main_db.store_slugs, 4) GET /api/shop/demo-store works without auth, 5) POST /api/store/products adds product to store, 6) POST /api/shop/demo-store/order creates COD order successfully.

verified: Features include: pos, inventory, customers, reports, multi_warehouse, woocommerce
Includes tenant_id and user_type in response
Slug mapping includes tenant_id, store_slug, enabled, store_name
Uses slug from main_db to find tenant
Order appears in store orders list
